title: Age composition analysis reveals hidden audience value
insight: Different creatives attract wildly different age demographics, and age has massive impact on downstream conversion. Trial CVR by age group: 18-24 = 18%, 25-34 = 26%, 35-44 = 32%, 45-54 = 44%, 55-64 = 48%, 65+ = 42%. Ads that attract older users are more valuable and need different Cost per Trial goals. Analyze age composition using pivot tables in Ads Reporting to identify which creatives push older and design hypotheses for replication.
raw_excerpt: As creative = targeting you'll find wildly different demographic distribution across different ads. Downstream trial CVR by age: 18-24 = 18%, 25-34 = 26%, 35-44 = 32%, 44-45 = 44%, 55-64 = 48%, 65+ = 42%.
actionable_steps: Go to Ads Reporting and set up a pivot table with ad name, age, gender, spend
Visualize age distribution per creative using a 100% stacked bar chart
Identify which creatives attract 35+ audiences with higher conversion rates
Set different Cost per Trial goals by age group using Value Rules
Design and test creative hypotheses that skew toward older demographics
